title: montanoa tomentosa subsp. rosei
intro: Montanoa tomentosa subsp. rosei is a subspecies of the Montanoa tomentosa plant, commonly known as the "tree daisy" due to its tall stature and daisy-like flowers. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The leaves and flowers of Montanoa tomentosa subsp. rosei have been used in traditional herbal medicine to promote health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate various health issues.
